--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local a==-781789-(-781793)then a=1029425+-1029425 local b=S(e/(-337508-(-403044)))local B=S((e%(568944+-503408))/(-264058+264314))local d=e%(-103843-(-104099))V(H,j(b,B,d))e=-863846-(-863846)end elseif d(b,{D,Z;P;V},B,S)end return D end,function(b,B)local S=e(B)local D=function(...)return d(b,{...},B,S)end return D end,{},function(b,B)local S=e(B)local D=function(D,Z,P)return d(b,{D,Z;P},B,S)end
